review_title: Best chatbot builder with a lot of features
description: We're very pleased with the possibilities of the chatbot and look forward to see how it develops itself even further with the help of its users.
author: Delphine V.
pros: This chatbot builder is quite easy to use when you have a bit of logical understanding and knowledge. It has a lot of features and can be implemented with different parties, including other chat-apps.
cons: To change or view some core features, you have to apply to the customer support, like a list of all of the attributes, being able to copy your chatbot to a live chat bot etc. this is a bit of a hastle, luckily the customer support provides swift feedback and help and are very friendly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great functionalities in one package!
description: Great tool, super intuitive and easy to use. Customer support is exceptional and there is no problem that cannot be solved within a single business day. For a SaaS business dealing with a worldwide audience, it's a great way to minimize the workload on our customer support team.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's super easy to use and once you take some time to set things up, it can learn on its own. It can adapt to different contexts pretty easily and cover a bunch of use cases. If you were afraid that a chatbot wouldn't sound human, this tool will prove you wrong.
cons: If you run a small business, you'll find it expensive to start with. However, it really pays itself off if you want to have 24-hour coverage on your website.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: STAY AWAY! Another Scam App. High Promises, Zero Delivery
description: When we saw the demo, we simply loved the solution and we bought the Quarterly plan in English + Arabic for $999. The onboarding process was supposed to take 2 weeks. The problems began during the onboarding process. The team is lethargic to respond to queries - their claim of the email being their official source of communication says it all. These guys are selling a chatbot solution and will only respond by email!!! The team was taking things jolly well. Remember, the timeline kicks in as soon as you pay (yes, not from the day of deployment but the date of payment), so any delays impact your cost. We launched the WIP solution in week 3, as we did not want to lose precious time. And wanted to do the testing as we go along. That opened up the can of worms. Their platform has an infinite number of bugs! Their mobile app freezes and doesn't even notify when a user is online. So, an e-commerce user looking for an agent is kept waiting as the app doesn't even notify the agent, and there you go, you lost your customer. Over the last 3 days, we had numerous cases where customers exited as they couldn't chat with an agent. And the team is very laid back, I would have raised so many tickets and requests for fixes. And now they are about to kill the WhatsApp user interface. From an amazing instantaneous WhatsApp, they want to transfer the interactions to their app. It's scary to imagine the customer fury that we have to face with the WhatsApp migration. Save yourself. PICK ANOTHER
author: Harsha P.
pros: The sale process - how they demonstrated that this solution could do wonders! That's where we fell. We should have done thorough research.
cons: The entire experience was a nightmare. The onboarding process takes forever against their 2 weeks promise. They take the money upfront, and you are stuck. We opted for two languages option, and we could not even deploy English and had to pull out the bot from our Shopify store. Empty promises made during the sale (e.g. all past WhatsApp conversations can be read/ tagged by the API, which apparently can't be!). The mobile app is full of bugs. Agents are not notified of customers requesting to connect with an agent. The support teams were lethargic and would only want to respond by email. If you are an e-commerce player, STAY AWAY from Engati.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to implement and good customer support
description: Building the bot was was easy and fun for the 1st time. Have used different nodes and trained the chatbot on our document as well. That's working fine. The chatbot needs to be trained for all the use cases, and all possible/probable combinations and then it starts picking the context also. Overall, a good experience and it's worth giving a try.

pros: 1. Good customer support 2. Easy to build flows 3. Easy to train the chatbot
cons: The price might be a bit on the higher side when compared to others, but it covers all functionalities.

It was so user-friendly that even a person like me having no prior programming knowledge was able to create a decent application-oriented chatbot. Moreover, the statistics and data it provides regarding the interactions of users with it are also very nice. It is really a handy feature for developers. It really helped me train by Chatbot to the best. Overall, it's GUI combined with the data analysis it provides gives it an edge over other platforms in the market.
cons: The website back-end is not so good. I have only this complaint about the platform. I noticed sometimes the web pages reload and even some buttons don't work. i.e. the hyperlink or href is missed out for some buttons.
